subcodes.first_line: O luminous candle of the love of God! Shed thy radiance at the pole of all horizons, and cast thy rays upon the hearts of the faithful, that [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای شمع پرنور محبت الله اشراقی در قطب آفاق کن و پرتوی بر قلوب اهل وفاق افکن تا
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @being a source of light; guidance
